connections.when: data quality metrics feed into observability dashboards and alerting
connections.yields: quality metrics as observability signals, alerting integration

connections.when: CRITICAL anomalies detected that require immediate investigation
connections.yields: incident triage for data quality failures

connections.when: schema drift detection validates database evolution and migration safety
connections.yields: schema validation patterns, migration safety checks

connections.when: data quality checks serve as pipeline integration tests
connections.yields: data pipeline test patterns, quality assertion frameworks
